```{r pca}
    "<br>Tota_reads:", total_reads,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 696 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "sequencing_platform", shape = "celltype",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 
p2_interactive <- ggplotly(p2, tooltip = "text")
p2_interactive

#### PC3 vs PC4 ####
xlab <- paste0("PC3 (", percent_var[3], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC4 (", percent_var[4], "%)")

p3 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC3,
  y = PC4,
  color = condition,
  shape = celltype,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Tota_reads:", total_reads,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 696 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "condition", shape = "celltype",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 
p3_interactive <- ggplotly(p3, tooltip = "text")
p3_interactive

#### PC4 vs PC5 ####
xlab <- paste0("PC4 (", percent_var[4], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC5 (", percent_var[5], "%)")

p4 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC4,
  y = PC5,
  color = condition,
  shape = celltype,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Tota_reads:", total_reads,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 696 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "condition", shape = "celltype",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 
p4_interactive <- ggplotly(p4, tooltip = "text")
p4_interactive

# which PC captures condition effect? bar plot 
ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = condition, y = PC6, fill = condition)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "PC6 captures condition effect", y = paste0("PC6 (", percent_var[6], "%)"))

# Run ANOVA across PCs to see which PC corresponds to "CONDITION"
pca_scores$condition <- metadata.clean$condition

# Loop through top 10 PCs
for (i in 1:10) {
  cat(paste0("PC", i, ": "))
  print(summary(aov(pca_scores[,i] ~ pca_scores$condition)))
}
```
```{r pca_MEL}
this_matrix <- log2CPM.clean[expressed_genes, grepl("MEL",colnames(log2CPM.clean))]
this_metadata <- metadata.clean[metadata.clean$sample%in%colnames(this_matrix),]
# colnames(this_matrix)==this_metadata$sample

# Calculate Coefficient of Variation (COV)
gene_means <- rowMeans(this_matrix)
gene_sds <- apply(this_matrix, 1, sd)
gene_cov <- gene_sds / gene_means

# Remove genes with mean = 0 to avoid NaNs
gene_cov[is.na(gene_cov)] <- 0

# Select top N variable genes
top_n <- 3000
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_cov, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]

# Subset log2CPM
log2CPM_subset <- this_matrix[top_genes, ]

#calculate principal components for top 3000 COV genes' log2CPM
pca_obj <- prcomp(t(log2CPM_subset), scale. = TRUE)

pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_obj$x)  # this is samples × PCs
pca_scores$sample_id <- colnames(this_matrix)     # optional
pca_scores$celltype <- this_metadata$celltype
pca_scores$condition <- this_metadata$condition
pca_scores$donor <- this_metadata$donor
pca_scores$read_length <- this_metadata$read_length
pca_scores$sequencing_platform <- this_metadata$sequencing_platform
pca_scores$unique_aligned_reads_over_total <- this_metadata$unique_aligned_reads_over_total
pca_scores$total_reads <- this_metadata$total_reads
# Get variance explained
percent_var <- round(100 * (pca_obj$sdev^2 / sum(pca_obj$sdev^2)), 1)
# Now use:
xlab <- paste0("PC1 (", percent_var[1], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")

p1 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC1,
  y = PC2,
  color = condition,
  shape = sequencing_platform,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total,
    "<br>Total reads:", total_reads
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 167 melanocytes samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "condition", shape = "sequencing_platform",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 

# Then enable the hover text in plotly
p1_interactive <- ggplotly(p1, tooltip = "text")
p1_interactive


# Extract top PC1 and PC2 gene loadings
top_pc1_genes <- names(sort(pca_obj$rotation[, 1], decreasing = TRUE)[1:30])
bottom_pc1_genes <- names(sort(pca_obj$rotation[, 1], decreasing = FALSE)[1:30])

top_pc2_genes <- names(sort(pca_obj$rotation[, 2], decreasing = TRUE)[1:30])
bottom_pc2_genes <- names(sort(pca_obj$rotation[, 2], decreasing = FALSE)[1:30])

#### PC2 vs PC3 ####
xlab <- paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC3 (", percent_var[3], "%)")

p2 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC2,
  y = PC3,
  color = sequencing_platform,
  shape = celltype,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 167 MEL samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "sequencing_platform", shape = "celltype",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 
p2_interactive <- ggplotly(p2, tooltip = "text")
p2_interactive

#### PC3 vs PC4 ####
xlab <- paste0("PC3 (", percent_var[3], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC4 (", percent_var[4], "%)")

p3 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC3,
  y = PC4,
  color = condition,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 751 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "condition", shape = "celltype",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 
p3_interactive <- ggplotly(p3, tooltip = "text")
p3_interactive

# which PC captures condition effect? bar plot 
ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = condition, y = PC4, fill = condition)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "PC4 captures condition effect", y = paste0("PC3 (", percent_var[3], "%)"))

# Run ANOVA across PCs to see which PC corresponds to "CONDITION"
pca_scores$condition <- metadata$condition

# Loop through top 10 PCs
for (i in 1:10) {
  cat(paste0("PC", i, ": "))
  print(summary(aov(pca_scores[,i] ~ pca_scores$condition)))
}
```
### DEseq2
```{r deseq2-mel}
this_counts <- counts.clean[, metadata.clean$celltype == "MEL"]
this_metadata <- metadata.clean[metadata.clean$celltype == "MEL",]
this_metadata$condition <- as.character(this_metadata$condition)

# Construct DESeqDataSet with all genes
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = this_counts, colData = this_metadata,
                              design = ~ sequencing_platform + condition)
dds$condition <- relevel(factor(dds$condition), ref = "PBS")

# Run DESeq
dds.mel <- DESeq(dds)

# DESeq2 results for MEL comparisons
res.mel.ifng <- results(dds.mel, contrast = c("condition", "IFNG", "PBS"))
res.mel.ifnb <- results(dds.mel, contrast = c("condition", "IFNB", "PBS"))
res.mel.tnf  <- results(dds.mel, contrast = c("condition", "TNF",  "PBS"))

# Filter significant DEGs (adj p < 0.05 and |log2FC| ≥ 1)
# before outlier exclusion: 4062 IFNG DEGs, 2333 IFNB DEGs, 1866 TNF DEGs
# after outlier exclusion: 5144 IFNG DEGs, 2572 IFNB DEGs, 1960 TNF DEGs
deg.mel.ifng <- as.data.frame(res.mel.ifng)[which(res.mel.ifng$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.mel.ifng$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene")  %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.mel.ifnb <- as.data.frame(res.mel.ifnb)[which(res.mel.ifnb$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.mel.ifnb$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene")  %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.mel.tnf  <- as.data.frame(res.mel.tnf)[which(res.mel.tnf$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.mel.tnf$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene")  %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)

# MA plot
plotMA(res.mel.ifng, main = "IFNG vs PBS (MEL)", ylim = c(-5, 5))

# Volcano plot
res.mel.ifng.df <- as.data.frame(res.mel.ifng)
res.mel.ifng.df$significant <- with(res.mel.ifng.df, padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) >= 1)

ggplot(res.mel.ifng.df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "IFNG vs PBS (MEL)", x = "log2FC", y = "-log10(adj. p)")

# make heatmap after removing batch effect
# VST transform first
vst.mel <- vst(dds.mel, blind = FALSE)
expr.mat <- assay(vst.mel)  # genes x samples

# Remove sequencing platform effect
platform <- colData(vst.mel)$sequencing_platform
expr.clean <- limma::removeBatchEffect(expr.mat, batch = platform)
expr.clean <- expr.mat
# plot heatmap
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

# Select top genes
top_genes <- unique(c(deg.mel.ifng$gene[1:50], deg.mel.ifnb$gene[1:50], deg.mel.tnf$gene[1:50]))
mat <- expr.clean[top_genes, ]
mat <- t(scale(t(mat))) # z-score by gene

# Annotate samples
ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = this_metadata$condition,
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "gray", "IFNG" = "red", "IFNB" = "blue", "TNF" = "gold"))
)

Heatmap(mat,
        name = "zscore vst (corrected)",
        top_annotation = ha,
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        show_column_names = FALSE,
        show_row_names = TRUE)
```
```{r deseq2-krt}
this_counts <- counts.clean[, metadata.clean$celltype == "KRT"]
this_metadata <- metadata.clean[metadata.clean$celltype == "KRT",]
this_metadata$condition <- as.character(this_metadata$condition)
colnames(this_counts)==this_metadata$sample

# Construct DESeqDataSet with all genes
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = this_counts, colData = this_metadata,
                              design = ~ sequencing_platform + condition)
dds$condition <- relevel(factor(dds$condition), ref = "PBS")

# Run DESeq
dds.krt <- DESeq(dds)

# DESeq2 results for MEL comparisons
res.krt.ifng <- results(dds.krt, contrast = c("condition", "IFNG", "PBS"))
res.krt.ifnb <- results(dds.krt, contrast = c("condition", "IFNB", "PBS"))
res.krt.tnf  <- results(dds.krt, contrast = c("condition", "TNF",  "PBS"))

# Filter significant DEGs (adj p < 0.05 and |log2FC| ≥ 1)
# before outlier exclusion: 2931 IFNG DEGs, 759 IFNB DEGs, 1036 TNF DEGs
# after outlier exclusion: 3140 IFNG DEGs, 902 IFNB DEGs, 1107 TNF DEGs. gained some power.
deg.krt.ifng <- as.data.frame(res.krt.ifng)[which(res.krt.ifng$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.krt.ifng$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.krt.ifnb <- as.data.frame(res.krt.ifnb)[which(res.krt.ifnb$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.krt.ifnb$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.krt.tnf  <- as.data.frame(res.krt.tnf)[which(res.krt.tnf$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.krt.tnf$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
```
```{r deseq2-frb}
## ----------------- FRB
this_counts <- counts.clean[, metadata.clean$celltype == "FRB"]
this_metadata <- metadata.clean[metadata.clean$celltype == "FRB",]
this_metadata$condition <- as.character(this_metadata$condition)
colnames(this_counts)==this_metadata$sample

# Construct DESeqDataSet with all genes
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = this_counts, colData = this_metadata,
                              design = ~ sequencing_platform + condition)
dds$condition <- relevel(factor(dds$condition), ref = "PBS")

# Run DESeq
dds.frb <- DESeq(dds)

# DESeq2 results for MEL comparisons
res.frb.ifng <- results(dds.frb, contrast = c("condition", "IFNG", "PBS"))
res.frb.ifnb <- results(dds.frb, contrast = c("condition", "IFNB", "PBS"))
res.frb.tnf  <- results(dds.frb, contrast = c("condition", "TNF",  "PBS"))

# Filter significant DEGs (adj p < 0.05 and |log2FC| ≥ 1)
# before outlier exclusion: 1327 IFNG DEGs, 2157 IFNB DEGs, 3380 TNF DEGs
# after outlier exclusion: 1529 IFNG DEGs, 2439 IFNB DEGs, 3829 TNF DEGs. also gained power.
deg.frb.ifng <- as.data.frame(res.frb.ifng)[which(res.frb.ifng$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.frb.ifng$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.frb.ifnb <- as.data.frame(res.frb.ifnb)[which(res.frb.ifnb$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.frb.ifnb$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.frb.tnf  <- as.data.frame(res.frb.tnf)[which(res.frb.tnf$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.frb.tnf$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
```
```{r save}
save(deg.frb.ifnb, deg.frb.ifng, deg.frb.tnf, 
     deg.krt.ifnb, deg.krt.ifng, deg.krt.tnf, 
     deg.mel.ifnb, deg.mel.ifng, deg.mel.tnf, file = paste0(Dir,"/all_degs_abslog2FC1_padj0.05_post_outlier_exclusion.RData"))
```
# --- loading Rdata is up to here.
```{r deseq2-all}
## ----------------- all cell types
this_counts <- counts
this_metadata <- metadata
this_metadata$condition <- as.character(this_metadata$condition)
this_metadata$celltype <- as.character(this_metadata$celltype)
colnames(this_counts)==this_metadata$sample

# Construct DESeqDataSet with all genes
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = this_counts, colData = this_metadata,
                              design = ~ donor + celltype + condition + celltype:condition)
dds$condition <- relevel(factor(dds$condition), ref = "PBS")

# Run DESeq
dds.3ct <- DESeq(dds)

# DESeq2 results for MEL comparisons
res.3ct.ifng <- results(dds.3ct, contrast = c("condition", "IFNG", "PBS"))
res.3ct.ifnb <- results(dds.3ct, contrast = c("condition", "IFNB", "PBS"))
res.3ct.tnf  <- results(dds.3ct, contrast = c("condition", "TNF",  "PBS"))

# Filter significant DEGs (adj p < 0.05 and |log2FC| ≥ 1)
deg.3ct.ifng <- as.data.frame(res.3ct.ifng)[which(res.3ct.ifng$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.3ct.ifng$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.3ct.ifnb <- as.data.frame(res.3ct.ifnb)[which(res.3ct.ifnb$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.3ct.ifnb$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)
deg.3ct.tnf  <- as.data.frame(res.3ct.tnf)[which(res.3ct.tnf$padj < 0.05 & abs(res.3ct.tnf$log2FoldChange) >= 1), ] %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(padj)

vsd.3ct <- vst(dds.3ct, blind = FALSE) # this gives me globally transformed expression matrix
counts_norm <- counts(dds, normalized=TRUE)  # DESeq2-normalized counts (not library size scaled)
cpm_mat <- t(t(counts_norm) / colSums(counts_norm)) * 1e6

rm(this_counts, this_metadata, dds)
save.image(file=paste0(Dir,'/myEnvironment_main.RData'))
```
### Heatmap
Heatmap of all samples
```{r heatmap-log2(CPM+1)-outlier-excluded}
vars_deg <- ls(pattern = "^deg.")
gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
  get(var)$gene
})
expressed_DEG <- intersect(unique(unlist(expressed_genes_list)), 
                               unique(unlist(gene_lists)))

CPM_DEG <- CPM.clean[expressed_DEG,]
log2CPM_DEG <- log2(CPM_DEG + 1)

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(log2CPM_DEG, 14)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
                        rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
                        rep(7,km_res$breaks[7]-km_res$breaks[6]),
                        rep(8,km_res$breaks[8]-km_res$breaks[7]),
                        rep(9,km_res$breaks[9]-km_res$breaks[8]),
                        rep(10,km_res$breaks[10]-km_res$breaks[9]),
                        rep(11,km_res$breaks[11]-km_res$breaks[10]),
                        rep(12,km_res$breaks[12]-km_res$breaks[11]),
                        rep(13,km_res$breaks[13]-km_res$breaks[12]),
                        rep(14,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[13]))
km_res.rna <- km_res
split_instructions.rna <- split_instructions
rm(km_res, split_instructions)

# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap)==metadata$sample

metadata.clean$biosample = paste0(metadata.clean$donor,"_",metadata.clean$celltype,"_",metadata.clean$condition)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = metadata.clean$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = metadata.clean$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "#999999", "IFNG" = "#D7263D", "IFNB" = "#1E88E5", "TNF" = "#FFC107"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_allDEG_14kmm-hc_08052025_padj0.05_abslog2FC1_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, IFNg/IFNb/TNF stimulated, , known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(2,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(3,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(4,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(5,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(6,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(7,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(8,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(9,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(10,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(11,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(12,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
cluster1_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==1)]

for (i in 1:14){
  this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==i)]
  write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}

```
Heatmap per cytokine
```{r heatmap-PBS-IFNG}
# prep data table ####
vars_deg <- ls(pattern = "^deg.*ifng")
#gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
#  get(var)$gene
#})
gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
  df <- get(var)
  # keep only significant, upregulated genes
  df %>%
    filter(log2FoldChange > 1.5, padj < 0.01) %>%
    pull(gene)   # or `rownames(df)` if genes are rownames
})
expressed_DEG <- intersect(unique(unlist(expressed_genes_list)), 
                               unique(unlist(gene_lists)))

CPM_DEG <- CPM.clean[expressed_DEG,] %>% 
  dplyr::select(matches("PBS|IFNG"))
log2CPM_DEG <- log2(CPM_DEG + 1)
this_metadata <- metadata.clean %>% 
  dplyr::filter(sample%in%colnames(CPM_DEG)) %>%
  mutate(biosample = paste0(donor,"_",celltype,"_",condition))
this_metadata$sample==colnames(CPM_DEG)


# pheatmap
z_mat <- t(scale(t(log2CPM_DEG)))
my_cols  <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")))(101)
my_breaks <- seq(-2.5, 2.5, length.out = 101)  # clip extremes for readability
pheatmap(
  z_mat,
  scale = "none",                         # already scaled
  color = my_cols, breaks = my_breaks,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  show_rownames = FALSE, show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize = 10, border_color = NA
)

# cluster ####
# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/km_res_for_heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_IFNGDEG_6kmm-hc_03102026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.rds"))
km_res <- niceKmeans(log2CPM_DEG, 6)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
                        rep(6,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[5]))
km_res.rna <- km_res
split_instructions.rna <- split_instructions
rm(km_res, split_instructions)
#saveRDS(km_res.rna, file = paste0(Dir,"/km_res_for_heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_IFNGDEG_6kmm-hc_03102026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.rds"))


# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# plot heatmap ####
colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap)==this_metadata$sample

column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = this_metadata$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = this_metadata$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "#999999", "IFNG" = "#D7263D", "IFNB" = "#1E88E5", "TNF" = "#FFC107"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

# old heatmap: heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_IFNGDEG_6kmm-hc_08082025_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf
# 
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_IFNGDEG_6kmm-hc_03102026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "upregulated DE genes in 3 celltypes, Ctrl vs IFNg stimulated, , known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(2,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(3,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(4,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(5,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(6,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(7,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(8,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(9,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(10,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(11,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(12,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            show_column_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            #column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            #column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()



# ---- Analysis for each cluster ---- ####
for (i in 1:6){
  this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==i)]
  write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/IFNG_inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}
#
vars_res <- ls(pattern = "^res.*ifng")
gene_lists <- lapply(vars_res, function(var) {
  get(var)$gene
})
expressed_genes.krt <- intersect(unique(unlist(expressed_genes_list)), 
                               unique(unlist(gene_lists)))
# cluster 3
i=c(5)
this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna %in% i)]
this_metagenes_idx <- which(grepl("meta", this_cluster_genes))
temp1 <- data.frame(meta=this_cluster_genes[-this_metagenes_idx], 
                    name=this_cluster_genes[-this_metagenes_idx])
temp2 <- data.frame(meta=this_cluster_genes[this_metagenes_idx]) %>%
  left_join(., metagene_dict, join_by(meta))
temp3 <- rbind(temp1, temp2) %>% set_colnames(c("meta","gene"))
gene_ids <- convert_to_entrez(convert_meta_genes(temp3$gene))$ENTREZID

this_res <- as.data.frame(res.frb.ifng) %>%
  rownames_to_column("meta") %>%
  dplyr::filter(meta %in% temp3$meta) %>%
  left_join(temp3) %>%
  arrange(padj)

ego <- enrichGO(gene         = gene_ids,
                OrgDb        = org.Hs.eg.db,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                ont          = "BP",       # Biological Process
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                pvalueCutoff  = 0.1,
                qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
                readable      = TRUE)

ego.sig <- ego@result[ego@result$p.adjust<0.05,]


```

Heatmap per celltype
```{r heatmap-KRT}
vars_deg <- ls(pattern = "^deg.krt")
#gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
#  get(var)$gene
#})
gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
  df <- get(var)
  # keep only significant, upregulated genes
  df %>%
    filter(log2FoldChange > 1.5, padj < 0.01) %>%
    pull(gene)   # or `rownames(df)` if genes are rownames
})
expressed_DEG <- intersect(unique(unlist(expressed_genes_list)), 
                               unique(unlist(gene_lists)))

CPM_DEG <- CPM.clean[expressed_DEG,] %>% 
  dplyr::select(matches("KRT"))
log2CPM_DEG <- log2(CPM_DEG + 1)
this_metadata <- metadata.clean %>% 
  dplyr::filter(sample%in%colnames(CPM_DEG)) %>%
  mutate(biosample = paste0(donor,"_",celltype,"_",condition))
this_metadata$sample==colnames(CPM_DEG)

# split rows by determined number of clusters
# km_res <- niceKmeans(log2CPM_DEG, 5)
# split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
#                         rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
#                         rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
#                         rep(5,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[4]))
#saveRDS(km_res, file=paste0(Dir,"km_res_for_heatmap_RNAseq_KRT_allcytokines_outlier-excluded_inducedGenes_5km_03162026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.rds"))
km_res.rna <- readRDS(paste0(Dir,"km_res_for_heatmap_RNAseq_KRT_allcytokines_outlier-excluded_inducedGenes_5km_03162026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.rds"))
# remap class based on my preference
km_res.rna$clustered <- km_res.rna$clustered %>%
  mutate(
    class = case_when(
      class == 5 ~ 1L,
      class == 1 ~ 2L,
      class == 2 ~ 3L,
      class == 3 ~ 4L,
      class == 4 ~ 5L
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(class)

split_instructions.rna <- km_res.rna$clustered$class


# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap)==this_metadata$sample

column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  celltype = this_metadata$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  condition = this_metadata$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  
  col = list(celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF"),
             condition = c("PBS" = "#999999", "IFNG" = "#D7263D", "IFNB" = "#1E88E5", "TNF" = "#FFC107")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_all-KRT-DEG_5kmm-hc_03132026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
# png(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_all-KRT-DEG_5kmm-hc_03132026_padj0.01_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.png"),
#   width = 24, height = 30, units = "in", res = 300)

heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            #right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "upregulated DE genes in KRT, Ctrl vs IFNg/IFNb/TNFa stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(2,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(3,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_PBS",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(4,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(5,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(6,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNG",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(7,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(8,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(9,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNB",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(10,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("FRB_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(11,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("KRT_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)])),
                                             rep(12,length(this_metadata$biosample[grepl("MEL_TNF",this_metadata$biosample)]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            show_column_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            #column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(3, "mm"),
                            column_gap = unit(3, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            #column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

for (i in 1:5){
  this_cluster_genes = convert_meta_genes(rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==i)])
  write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}

this_cluster_genes
gene="MUC1"
#plot_violinbox_plot_cytokine_faceted(gene)
p = plot_violinbox_plot_cytokine_faceted_by_celltype_grouped_by_phase(gene) 

# plot all the genes
pdf(paste0(Dir, "KRT_allcytokines_cluster6_gene_violinplots_03162026.pdf"), width = 12, height = 6)
for (gene in this_cluster_genes) {
  p <- plot_violinbox_plot(gene) +
       ggtitle(gene)
  print(p)
  message(gene)
}
dev.off()

```

```{r pca for each cluster}
# ----------------------------
# 1. Subset matrix to cluster genes
# ----------------------------
cluster_genes_use <- intersect(this_cluster_genes, rownames(log2CPM.clean))

if (length(cluster_genes_use) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 genes from this_cluster_genes found in log2CPM.clean")
}

this_matrix <- log2CPM.clean[cluster_genes_use, , drop = FALSE]

# Optional: remove zero-variance genes
gene_sds <- apply(this_matrix, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
this_matrix <- this_matrix[gene_sds > 0, , drop = FALSE]

if (nrow(this_matrix) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 non-zero-variance genes remain for PCA")
}

# ----------------------------
# 2. PCA on samples using cluster genes only
# ----------------------------
pca_obj <- prcomp(t(this_matrix), scale. = TRUE)

pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_obj$x)
pca_scores$sample_id <- colnames(this_matrix)
pca_scores$celltype <- metadata.clean$celltype
pca_scores$condition <- metadata.clean$condition
pca_scores$donor <- metadata.clean$donor
pca_scores$read_length <- metadata.clean$read_length
pca_scores$sequencing_platform <- metadata.clean$sequencing_platform
pca_scores$unique_aligned_reads_over_total <- metadata.clean$unique_aligned_reads_over_total
pca_scores$total_reads <- metadata.clean$total_reads

# Variance explained
percent_var <- round(100 * (pca_obj$sdev^2 / sum(pca_obj$sdev^2)), 1)
xlab <- paste0("PC1 (", percent_var[1], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")

# ----------------------------
# 3. PCA plot colored by sequencing platform
# ----------------------------
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)

p_platform <- ggplot(
  data = pca_scores,
  aes(
    x = PC1,
    y = PC2,
    color = sequencing_platform,
    shape = condition,
    text = paste(
      "Sample:", sample_id,
      "<br>Donor:", donor,
      "<br>Condition:", condition,
      "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
      "<br>Sequencing platform:", sequencing_platform,
      "<br>Read length:", read_length,
      "<br>Total reads:", total_reads,
      "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total
    )
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = paste0(
      "PCA using cluster genes only (n = ", nrow(this_matrix), ")"
    ),
    x = xlab,
    y = ylab,
    color = "Sequencing platform",
    shape = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

p_platform_interactive <- ggplotly(p_platform, tooltip = "text")
p_platform_interactive
```

## Skip: Combat-seq correction necessary? Probably not. main heatmap still shows a cluster with batch separation. 
```{r heatmap-Combat-seq-corrected-outlier-excluded}
# perform the batch correction
# transform the format of our groups and batches from names to numbers (e.g. 1, 2, etc.)
groups = sapply(as.character(metadata.clean$condition), switch, "PBS" = 1, "IFNG" = 2, "IFNB" = 3, "TNF" = 4, USE.NAMES = F)
seq_platform = as.numeric(as.factor(metadata.clean$sequencing_platform))

# perform batch correction
counts.corrected = ComBat_seq(counts = as.matrix(counts.clean), batch = seq_platform, group = groups)
col.sum=apply(counts.corrected,2,sum)
CPM.clean.corrected=sweep(counts.corrected, 2, col.sum, `/`)*1000000
log2CPM.clean.corrected=log2(CPM.clean.corrected+1)
rm(groups, donor, col.sum)

# make heatmap after removing batch effect using Combat-seq
vars_deg <- ls(pattern = "^deg.")
gene_lists <- lapply(vars_deg, function(var) {
  get(var)$gene
})
expressed_DEG <- intersect(unique(unlist(expressed_genes_list)), 
                               unique(unlist(gene_lists)))

CPM_DEG <- CPM.clean.corrected[expressed_DEG,]
log2CPM_DEG <- log2(CPM_DEG + 1)

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(log2CPM_DEG, 14)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
                        rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
                        rep(7,km_res$breaks[7]-km_res$breaks[6]),
                        rep(8,km_res$breaks[8]-km_res$breaks[7]),
                        rep(9,km_res$breaks[9]-km_res$breaks[8]),
                        rep(10,km_res$breaks[10]-km_res$breaks[9]),
                        rep(11,km_res$breaks[11]-km_res$breaks[10]),
                        rep(12,km_res$breaks[12]-km_res$breaks[11]),
                        rep(13,km_res$breaks[13]-km_res$breaks[12]),
                        rep(14,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[13]))
km_res.rna <- km_res
split_instructions.rna <- split_instructions
rm(km_res, split_instructions)

# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap)==metadata.clean$sample
metadata.clean$biosample = paste0(metadata.clean$donor,"_",metadata.clean$celltype,"_",metadata.clean$condition)

column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = metadata.clean$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = metadata.clean$biosample %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "#999999", "IFNG" = "#D7263D", "IFNB" = "#1E88E5", "TNF" = "#FFC107"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_3ctk_outlier-excluded_CombatCorrected_allDEG_14kmm-hc_08052025_padj0.05_abslog2FC1_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM Seq_platform corrected",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, IFNg/IFNb/TNF stimulated, , known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(2,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(3,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_PBS",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(4,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(5,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(6,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNG",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(7,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(8,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(9,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_IFNB",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(10,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("FRB_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)])), 
                                             rep(11,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("KRT_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)])),
                                             rep(12,length(metadata.clean$biosample[grepl("MEL_TNF",metadata.clean$biosample)]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
cluster1_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==1)]

for (i in 1:14){
  this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==i)]
  write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}

```
```{r PCA-of-outliers}
#log2CPM.clean.corrected=log2(CPM.clean.corrected+1)
this_log2CPM <- log2CPM.clean.corrected[expressed_genes,]

# Calculate Coefficient of Variation (COV)
gene_means <- rowMeans(this_log2CPM)
gene_sds <- apply(this_log2CPM, 1, sd)
gene_cov <- gene_sds / gene_means

# Remove genes with mean = 0 to avoid NaNs
gene_cov[is.na(gene_cov)] <- 0

# Select top N variable genes
top_n <- 3000
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_cov, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]

# Subset log2CPM
log2CPM_subset <- this_log2CPM[top_genes, ]

#calculate principal components for top 3000 COV genes' log2CPM
pca_obj <- prcomp(t(log2CPM_subset), scale. = TRUE)

pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_obj$x)  # this is samples × PCs
pca_scores$sample_id <- colnames(counts.clean)     # optional
pca_scores$celltype <- metadata.clean$celltype
pca_scores$condition <- metadata.clean$condition
pca_scores$donor <- metadata.clean$donor
pca_scores$read_length <- metadata.clean$read_length
pca_scores$sequencing_platform <- metadata.clean$sequencing_platform
pca_scores$unique_aligned_reads_over_total <- metadata.clean$unique_aligned_reads_over_total
pca_scores$is_outlier <- ifelse(rownames(pca_scores)%in%unique(c(outlier.mel,outlier.krt)),"yes","no")

# Get variance explained
percent_var <- round(100 * (pca_obj$sdev^2 / sum(pca_obj$sdev^2)), 1)
# Now use:
xlab <- paste0("PC1 (", percent_var[1], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")

p1 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC1,
  y = PC2,
  color = celltype,
  #shape = condition,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total,
    "<br>outlier", is_outlier
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 751 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes\nSeq_platform corrected",
       color = "outlier", shape = "condition",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 

# Then enable the hover text in plotly
p1_interactive <- ggplotly(p1, tooltip = "text")
p1_interactive

### PC2 v PC3
xlab <- paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")
ylab <- paste0("PC3 (", percent_var[3], "%)")

p2 = ggplot(data=pca_scores, aes(
  x = PC2,
  y = PC3,
  color = celltype,
  shape = condition,
  text = paste(
    "Sample:", rownames(pca_scores),
    "<br>Donor:", donor,
    "<br>Condition:", condition,
    "<br>Celltype:", celltype,
    "<br>read_length:", read_length,
    "<br>Platform:", sequencing_platform,
    "<br>Aligned:", unique_aligned_reads_over_total,
    "<br>outlier", is_outlier
  )
)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA, RNA-seq counts for all 751 samples\ntop 3000 COV expressed genes",
       color = "celltype", shape = "condition",
       x = xlab, y = ylab) 

# Then enable the hover text in plotly
p2_interactive <- ggplotly(p2, tooltip = "text")
p2_interactive
```
